what.heading: What is GolfBooth?
what.lead: A premium golf simulator that travels to your event.
what.body: GolfBooth is a sleek, branded golf simulator booth that we bring to your venue, set up, and run for your guests. No golf course, no hassle — just a high-end, interactive experience that fits corporate parties, tournaments, trade shows, and private events.
points: Professional-grade launch monitor and stunning course visuals
Sleek branded booth that fits corporate, sport, and festival settings
On-site staff to set up, run challenges, and keep the line moving

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know to get started.

items.question: How much space does the booth need?
items.answer: The booth works in most indoor and outdoor spaces. Once we know your venue, we'll confirm the exact footprint and ceiling height needed.

items.question: Do you set everything up?
items.answer: Yes. Our team handles delivery, full setup, on-site operation, and teardown. You just enjoy your event.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: We serve Ottawa, Gatineau, and surrounding communities including Kanata, Orléans, Nepean, Barrhaven, Aylmer, Hull, and Chelsea.

items.question: Can it go indoors and outdoors?
items.answer: Both. The booth is designed for indoor venues and covered outdoor setups. Let us know your plan and we'll advise.

items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: The earlier the better, especially during peak season. Reach out with your date and we'll confirm availability.

items.question: How do I get a price?
items.answer: Pricing is custom to your event. Request a quote with your details and we'll send you a tailored estimate.

finalCta.heading: Ready to bring GolfBooth to your event?
finalCta.subtitle: Tell us about your event and we'll send a custom quote — usually within one business day.

hero.title: Golf Simulator Rental in Ottawa
hero.subtitle: A premium mobile golf simulator delivered to your Ottawa event — corporate parties, tournaments, trade shows, and more.

sections.heading: Mobile golf, anywhere in Ottawa
paragraphs: GolfBooth brings a premium golf simulator directly to your event anywhere in Ottawa. We deliver, set up, run the experience, and pack it all up — so you can focus on your guests. From downtown office towers to venues in Kanata, Orléans, Nepean, and Barrhaven, we've got the National Capital covered.

Our sleek, branded booth pairs a professional-grade launch monitor with stunning course visuals, giving guests of every skill level a genuinely impressive experience. It's the kind of activation people talk about long after the event ends.

sections.heading: Perfect for Ottawa events of every kind
paragraphs: Corporate teams use GolfBooth for holiday parties, client appreciation days, and team-building. Tournament organizers add it for pre-round warm-ups and longest-drive contests. Brands rent it to draw crowds at trade shows and activations across the city.
Wherever your event is in Ottawa, we'll confirm the space requirements and handle the logistics. All you have to do is tell us the date.

hero.title: Golf Simulator Rental in Gatineau
hero.subtitle: A premium mobile golf simulator for your event in Gatineau, Aylmer, Hull, and Chelsea.

sections.heading: Mobile golf across Gatineau
paragraphs: GolfBooth delivers a premium golf simulator experience throughout Gatineau and the surrounding communities of Aylmer, Hull, and Chelsea. Our team handles delivery, setup, on-site operation, and teardown, so your event runs effortlessly.
The booth combines a professional-grade launch monitor with realistic course visuals — an engaging, high-end attraction that works for guests of all skill levels.

sections.heading: Built for Gatineau events
paragraphs: From corporate functions and golf tournaments to trade shows, fundraisers, and private celebrations, GolfBooth adds energy and entertainment to any occasion in the region.
Tell us about your event and venue, and we'll send a custom quote with everything you need to know.

hero.title: Corporate Event Entertainment
hero.subtitle: Make your next corporate event unforgettable with a premium mobile golf simulator in Ottawa and Gatineau.

sections.heading: Entertainment that brings teams together
paragraphs: GolfBooth is a standout addition to corporate events of all sizes — holiday parties, client appreciation events, employee engagement days, and team-building. It gets people interacting, competing, and having fun, without anyone needing to be a golfer.
We deliver and run the entire experience at your venue, indoors or in a covered outdoor space, so your team can simply enjoy the event.

sections.heading: A premium, professional experience
paragraphs: Our branded booth and professional-grade equipment make a strong impression on employees and clients alike. Add custom challenges, leaderboards, and team battles to keep the energy high all event long.
Request a quote and we'll tailor the GolfBooth experience to your corporate event in Ottawa or Gatineau.

hero.title: Golf Simulators for Tournaments
hero.subtitle: Add a mobile golf simulator to your tournament for warm-ups, contests, and sponsor activations.

sections.heading: More than a round of golf
paragraphs: GolfBooth is the perfect complement to charity and corporate golf tournaments. Use it for pre-round warm-ups, longest-drive and closest-to-the-pin contests, or post-round entertainment that keeps everyone engaged.
It's also a powerful sponsor activation opportunity — a branded, high-visibility attraction that delivers real value to your partners.

sections.heading: Seamless setup at your course or venue
paragraphs: Our team handles delivery, setup, and operation, working around your tournament schedule. Whether it's at the clubhouse, the turn, or an indoor reception, GolfBooth slots right in.
Tell us about your tournament and we'll put together a custom quote for Ottawa, Gatineau, and the surrounding region.

hero.title: Trade Show & Brand Activations
hero.subtitle: Draw crowds and start conversations with a mobile golf simulator at your next trade show or activation.

sections.heading: Turn foot traffic into engagement
paragraphs: Nothing stops booth traffic like the chance to take a swing. GolfBooth is a magnet for attendees, giving your team natural openings to start conversations and capture leads at trade shows across Ottawa and Gatineau.
The booth can be branded to your company, and we can run contests and leaderboards to keep visitors engaged and coming back.

sections.heading: A memorable, premium presence
paragraphs: Our sleek booth and professional-grade equipment elevate your brand's presence and create a genuinely memorable experience for attendees.
Request a quote and we'll help design a GolfBooth activation that meets your goals for the show.

sections.heading: Overview
paragraphs: GolfBooth ("we", "us", "our") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information in accordance with applicable Canadian and Quebec privacy laws, including Quebec's Law 25. This policy explains what information we collect, why, and how we handle it.

sections.heading: Information we collect
paragraphs: When you submit our quote request form, we collect the information you provide, such as your name, company, email address, phone number, event date, event location, event type, estimated guest count, setting preference, and any message you include.
We may also collect limited, non-identifying analytics data about how visitors use our website (for example, pages viewed), where you have consented to non-essential cookies.

sections.heading: How we use your information
paragraphs: We use your information solely to respond to your inquiry, prepare and send a quote, communicate with you about your event, and improve our services. We do not sell your personal information.

sections.heading: Cookies and consent
paragraphs: Essential cookies are required for the site to function. Non-essential cookies (such as analytics) are only used with your consent, which you can give or decline using our cookie banner.

sections.heading: Data retention
paragraphs: We retain your information only as long as necessary to respond to your request and for reasonable business and legal purposes, after which it is securely deleted.

sections.heading: Your rights
paragraphs: You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal information. To make a request, contact us at info@golfbooth.ca.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: For any privacy questions or requests, email info@golfbooth.ca or call (613) 290-1001.

sections.heading: Acceptance of terms
paragraphs: By accessing and using the GolfBooth website, you agree to these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

sections.heading: Our services
paragraphs: GolfBooth provides mobile golf simulator rental and event services in Ottawa, Gatineau, and surrounding areas. Quote requests submitted through the site are inquiries only and do not constitute a confirmed booking until agreed in writing.

sections.heading: Quotes and bookings
paragraphs: Pricing is custom to each event and provided by quote. Bookings, deposits, cancellations, and any other terms specific to your event will be set out in a separate agreement.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
paragraphs: All content on this website, including the GolfBooth name, logo, text, and images, is the property of GolfBooth and may not be used without permission.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: The website is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. GolfBooth is not liable for any damages arising from your use of the site.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: Questions about these terms? Email info@golfbooth.ca or call (613) 290-1001.
